nasb.text: The ravens brought him bread and meat in the morning and bread and meat in the evening, and he would drink from the brook.

esv.text: And the ravens brought him bread and meat in the morning, and bread and meat in the evening, and he drank from the brook.

cnv.text: 烏鴉早晨給他送餅和肉來，晚上也送餅和肉來，他也喝那溪裡的水。

ccb.text: 乌鸦每天早晚为他叼来饼和肉，他喝溪里的水。
